title: After SpliceRows, shifted rows lost cell names
author: supermyz

comments.author: sngsweekeat
comments.body: I'm seeing the same problem - I basically want to insert new rows, but all rows from the insertion point down lose all their styles.

comments.author: FluffyNevyn
comments.body: I am also seeing this issue - glad I checked the open issues before submitting a new one.  After a call to worksheet.spliceRows(...) any rows that get Moved lose all style information (font, fill, border, etc...)

comments.author: iva2k
comments.body: Should this issue be closed? (PR with a fix was merged)

comments.author: nhd2106
comments.body:
> I am also seeing this issue - glad I checked the open issues before submitting a new one. After a call to worksheet.spliceRows(...) any rows that get Moved lose all style information (font, fill, border, etc...)

i still got this issue, i'm using lastest version

comments.author: baelene
comments.body: I have also the issue with merged cells: after spliceRows, the merged cells below the deleted rows are not (merged) anymore.

comments.author: tsensei
comments.body: @baelene Did you get any solution for this ?
